spec.name: The Lair
spec.description: This place is huge!!! It should be considering the dragon's great bulk. However, instead of seeing the customary carnage and mound of gold that one is accustomed to seeing in a dragon lair, this one is decorated subtly with tapestries and drapes, and other comforts of human life. There is even a huge-dragon sized bed -- undoubtedly conjured to life by its elder dragon owner.
